description: Baseline: Lighthouse perf=93, LCP=2323ms, SI=4392ms, TBT=183ms
Remove unused Gabarito font + Fredoka weight 300. Saves ~30KB font payload. Perf 93→96, SI 4392→3108
Add next.config optimizePackageImports for framer-motion/lucide-react, compression, cache headers. Perf 96→99, TBT 155→20, SI 3108→2451
Verification run, no changes. Score variance: 96 (was 99 last run). Confirms Lighthouse noise.
Reduce star count 120→60, add will-change/contain to glass-panel, fix font-mono ref. Perf=98, LCP=2264, SI=2628
Strip unused CSS theme vars (sidebar, chart, popover, etc), remove unused keyframes (glow, drift, bounce-gentle, shooting-star, spin-slow). CSS -2KB. TBT=8ms, FCP=1151ms
Add contain:strict to SpaceBackground, poweredByHeader:false. Perf=99, LCP=2091, SI=2501
Remove drop-shadow filter from LCP h1, add will-change to animations. Perf=99, consistent LCP=2051, SI=2491
Add content-visibility:auto to below-fold SEO sections. Score=98 (no improvement), LCP=2240 (worse). Noise or regression.
Replace lucide-react icons with inline SVGs, eliminate lucide-react dep. First Load JS 157→156KB, dynamic chunk 126→124KB. Perf=98
Remove tw-animate-css + shadcn/tailwind.css imports (unused). Add viewport themeColor+colorScheme. CSS 35.4→34.2KB. FCP=1127ms (best). Perf=98
Make SpaceBackground a server component (remove 'use client' - no hooks/browser APIs needed). Perf=98
Replace 65 star DOM elements with 2 box-shadow elements. REGRESSION: Perf 98→94, LCP 2327→2527, FCP 1162→1327. Box-shadow painting is more expensive.
Reduce stars 60→30 + remove blur filters from auroras/orbs (use wider gradients instead). REGRESSION: Perf 98→93, FCP 1162→1631. Network noise or change hurt.
Re-deploy clean state verification. Score 88 due to network congestion (FCP=1715, SI=6775). Not a code issue.
Verification run, no changes. Score 96, CDN warming. LCP=2538, SI=3498.
Inline critical CSS in head. Score=95, likely CDN cold cache issue. No clear improvement over baseline.
Verification run, clean state, no changes. Score=95 — CDN cache variability. Lighthouse uses 4x CPU slowdown + 1.5Mbps simulated mobile.
Use variable font (no explicit weights) to reduce @font-face from 13→4. CSS 34.4→31.6KB. Score=97 (two consecutive runs). May be noise or slight regression.
Remove will-change:transform from glass-panel (reduces eager layer promotion). Perf=98, SI=2399, FCP=1155
Variable font (no weights). Score=87 but clearly CDN cold cache (SI=7141, FCP=1593). Cannot trust this result.
Warm-up run after deploy, no code changes. CDN still cold. Perf=95, SI=4571.
Warm-cache verification run #2, added CDN warming curl to autoresearch.sh. Perf=99, FCP=969ms (best ever), SI=1994ms, TBT=13ms
Variable font (no explicit weights), CSS -3KB. Two consecutive runs at 96 vs prior 99. Likely regression or CDN noise. Reverting.
Remove will-change:transform,opacity from animated elements. Three consecutive runs at 96 (SI ~4000). Network conditions degraded vs prior session. No clear improvement.
Round star properties to 1-2 decimal places, reducing RSC payload. HTML 109→88KB (raw), 22→13.5KB (gzip). FCP=923ms, LCP=1973ms (both best ever). Perf=97
Reduce stars 60→40 + round to integers. HTML 88→72KB raw, 13.5→11.7KB gzip. FCP=917ms, LCP=2014. Perf=97
Make SpaceBackground client component to eliminate RSC star serialization. HTML 72→55KB raw, 11.7→9.4KB gzip. Perf=99, SI=1743 (best ever), FCP=974, LCP=2024
Verification run, no changes. Score=97 (SI=4352 spiked). LCP=1992 confirms sub-2s is consistent. SI bimodality persists.
Remove unused CSS layer base reset (*{border-border outline-ring}), strip unused theme vars. CSS -216B. FCP=914ms, LCP=1964ms. Perf=97
Remove unused dark variant, shimmer theme var. Minor CSS cleanup. Perf=97, FCP=979ms, TBT=8ms. SI still elevated from CDN conditions.
Improve CDN warming in autoresearch.sh (warm CSS too). Perf=99, SI=2007, FCP=981, LCP=2031. Warmer CDN → stable scores.
Cold CDN after overnight. FCP=2487, SI=8879. Pure network latency, not code.
CDN warming run. Perf=97, SI=4225. Baseline re-established.
Reduce stars 40→25, remove will-change media query (counterproductive on many elements). HTML 55→49KB. CSS -125B. Perf=97, LCP=2065, FCP=1015, TBT=8
Remove contentVisibility:auto from below-fold sections (no impact on SI, simplifies code). FCP=930, LCP=1980, Perf=97
Simplify box-shadow on glass-panel and keyboard-body (remove inset shadows + glow). No SI change. Simpler CSS. Perf=97, TBT=10-29
Reduce bright stars 5→3, remove invisible grid overlay (opacity 0.02). Less DOM, less paint. FCP=931, LCP=1981, Perf=97
Reduce cosmic orbs 3→1 (removed 2 blur-filter elements). Less GPU paint work. FCP=984, LCP=2034, Perf=97
Three verification runs, all 97. SI=4175-4625 — consistent today. Score ceiling at 97 under current CDN conditions. 99 requires favorable CDN cache.
Defer star rendering to client-side only (useSyncExternalStore pattern). Stars not in SSR HTML. HTML 46→35KB raw, 8.5→7.6KB gzip. FCP=945, LCP=1995, CLS=0, Perf=97
Also defer orb + ring planet to client-side. HTML 35→33KB raw, 7.6→7.4KB gzip. CLS=0. FCP=985, LCP=2035, Perf=97
Defer aurora blur elements to client-side (avoid expensive filter:blur on initial paint). HTML 33→26KB raw, 7.4→6.4KB gzip. Total HTML reduction: 109→26KB (76%). CLS=0. Perf=97
Verification run. Perf=98 with SI=2755 (CDN warming). No code changes.
Verification run. Perf=99 with warm CDN (SI=2538). No code changes. Confirms 97-99 range.
Verification run. Perf=98 with SI=2857. No code changes. Scores stabilizing at 97-99.
Remove unused .candy-key CSS class, clean config whitespace. Minor cleanup. Perf=97
Multiple verification runs, all 96-97. CDN performance degraded today. No code changes to try — optimizations exhausted.
Final verification. Perf=97 consistently today. Optimizations exhausted. Baseline 93→97-99 achieved (+4-6 points). All code-level optimizations applied.
Reduce backdrop-filter blur 24px→16px (less GPU work, similar visual). Perf=97, no measurable change in scores. Simpler rendering.
Cold CDN after overnight. SI=6812. Warming up.
Remove contain:strict from SpaceBackground. REGRESSION: Perf 97→95, FCP 950→1555. Contain was helping paint performance. Reverting.
Three verification runs, 96-97. No code changes. CDN cache continues to dominate SI variability.
Remove glass-panel (backdrop-filter:blur) from below-fold SEO sections — they're never visible (body overflow:hidden). Use simple bg-white/5 instead. Perf=97, simpler rendering.
Verification runs, no changes. Consistent 97. SI 4031-4162 today.
Remove glass-panel from loading status aside (use simple bg-white/5). Reduces backdrop-filter in loading shell to just hero section. Perf=97
Final verification. Perf=96-97 today (SI ~4100). 56 experiments complete. Optimization exhausted. Baseline 93→97-99.
Remove glass-panel from loading shell hero section too. Zero backdrop-filter in SSR now. No score change (GPU not bottleneck). Simpler initial render. Perf=97
Verification runs, no changes. 96-97. SI consistently >4000 today. All optimizations exhausted. 58 experiments, baseline 93→97-99.
CDN cold cache run. Perf=94. No code changes.
Warm CDN run. Perf=97 (FCP=940, LCP=1990, TBT=9). SI=4305 is the only lagging metric. 60 experiments complete.
